todos.content: Explore cyrus-hosted /settings/tools page and current platform selector
Explore cypack edgeconfig schema for allowed tools
Design toolset data model and product decisions
Add toolsets to cyrus-core EdgeConfig schema + regenerate JSON schemas
Wire toolsets through cyrus ConfigManager and ToolPermissionResolver
Add cyrus tests for toolset preset resolution and schema export
Publish cyrus-core test version for cyrus-hosted consumption
Add toolsets DB column + migration in cyrus-hosted
Update cyrus-hosted config builder + team-config-input for toolsets
Add cyrus-hosted server actions for toolset CRUD
Implement animated dropdown + toolset UI on /settings/tools
Create PRs with documented product decisions

part.text: Updated src/index.ts and validated the change.
